governing_logic: Psanan remains compressed but thick: fewer places, more law, ceremony, and industry per place.
canon_anchors: export of weapons and volcanic materials

role_bands.function: Transforms matriarchal Great House rule into clerks, precedence officers, seal keepers, dowry-pledge witnesses, and decision conveyors.
Turns forge economy into regulated civic machinery through workshop licenses, heat quotas, fuel accounting, output inspection, tool standards, and injury liability tracking.
Administers descent traffic, underworld-edge extraction, vent closures, haul schedules, and road watches between citadel, volcano, depths, and export points.
Makes ritual duel adjudication and martial prestige administratively real through lists, witnesses, challenge registries, injury arbitration, and public honor enforcement.
Converts weapons and volcanic materials into controlled outbound exchange through port factors, export seals, foreign yard audits, and coastal neutral-contact procedures.

anchor_allocations.functional_profile: Primary compression chamber of House law, forge prestige, ceremony, and command.
Main volcanic engine where fuel, heat, descent, and danger are all administratively rationed.
A controlled descent frontier for rare materials, danger claims, and licensed salvage.
More Psanan rather than different Psanan: a direct coastal expression of weapon export and volcanic materials trade.
More Psanan rather than different Psanan: a fortified answer to heat, theft, and material volatility.
More Psanan rather than different Psanan: a route bureaucracy implied by repeated extraction movement.
More Psanan rather than different Psanan: a watch station matching route and ash-route pressure.
More Psanan rather than different Psanan: a narrower export interface below the main harbor layer.
More Psanan rather than different Psanan: a named internal industrial corridor for concentrated production.

anchor_allocations.anchor_kind: formalized ascent-descent stair and inspection line
anchor_allocations.functional_profile: More Psanan rather than different Psanan: a circulation choke point where ritual and transport overlap.
